concerns.text: The specification omits any requirement to generate a synthetic validation dataset (as described in the Idea’s Methodology sketch, step 5) and to evaluate the inconsistency‑detection pipeline’s precision, recall, and F1. This constitutes an under‑reach because the idea explicitly calls for a synthetic validation step to quantify detector performance.

Corresponding success criteria for the synthetic validation (e.g., SC‑030: detection precision ≥ 90 % and recall ≥ 80 % on the synthetic dataset) are missing, leaving the evaluation of the detector’s accuracy undefined.
